title: limonium flexuosum
intro: Limonium flexuosum, also known as sea lavender, is a low-growing, succulent plant native to the coastal regions of Europe and North Africa. The plant's leaves and flowers have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Limonium flexuosum include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and acting as an expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. Herbal preparations of sea lavender can be made into teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
